title: Nata's Leaping Laelaps
description: Laelaps, a formidable creature from a bygone era, has now made its way to your land, with its untamed nature strength, and speed that cannot be ignored.
body:
![BannerLogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3dffeb3b494093c1f476c5ca78ee28ad9884cb21.png)

[Requires Geckolib.](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/version/oNBe6h9g)

Adding The Laelaps to your minecraft world. These mobs can be found in almost every biome in overworld. Encountering one can mean a death sentence if player is not well-prepared to combat due to its size, speed, and strength, these mobs can be very dangerous especially when they leap or swallow player alive.

Details are in this video: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/zbjDJ2GyQF0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
